## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [Code of Conduct](./CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test` all pass locally (CI must be green)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior I changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff; no stray debug code or secrets (API keys, tokens)
